/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m3  -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -Os -g -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -g -mcpu=cortex-m3  -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--gc-sections -T/mnt/d/project/SYS_Power/Program/STM32F103XX_FLASH.ld -Wl,-Map=SYS_Power.map CMakeFiles/SYS_Power.dir/Core/Src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/SYS_Power.dir/Core/Src/gpio.c.obj peripherals/oled/liboled.a SYSTEM/delay/libdelay.a SYSTEM/sys/libsys.a
